methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $10M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Nuclear Energy (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 8 same-sector peers exist in Nuclear Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy

data.narrative:
Hexium is a seed-stage nuclear energy company founded by Charlie Jarrott and Jacob Peterson that has raised $10M+. The valuation universe comprises 8 private peers (including Oklo, TerraPower, X-Energy, Kairos Power, and Nano Nuclear Energy) and 3 public comparables (OKLO, NNE, SMR), though the nuclear energy sector at seed stage remains sparse.

Only one valuation method proved applicable. The stage-progression approach uses the $10M total raised as a base proxy and applies a 2.5x multiplier typical of seed-to-next-stage advancement, yielding $25M. A peer-median approach was not viable due to insufficient comparables at matching stage and valuation tier—while 8 same-sector peers exist, only 1 occupied an adjacent stage and none fell within a similar valuation band, falling short of the 3-datapoint minimum for reliable benchmarking.

The triangulated range centers on $25M (median), with a low-end estimate of $21M and high-end of $29M. This narrow band reflects reliance on a single methodology. Key uncertainties include the stage-progression multiplier's applicability to frontier nuclear (which may command different expansion rates than mainstream venture), lack of direct peer validation at seed stage, and the nascency of commercial nuclear deployment timelines. Additional data on burn rate, technical milestones, and regulatory pathway clarity would improve conviction.
